summary: Frontend-only validation completed for Cat House redesign. All requested sections, CTA buttons, anchor navigation (desktop/mobile), gallery rendering, and contact details are working as specified.

issues: Third-party 'Made with Emergent' floating badge overlaps bottom-right viewport area and can visually compete with the floating WhatsApp CTA on smaller viewports.

action_items: Optional polish: reduce overlap risk between floating WhatsApp CTA and external floating badge in bottom-right area on mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation data-testid values are generated from labels (including spaces for 'Why Choose Us'), which reduces selector stability; consider slugified IDs for long-term test maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified against public URL from frontend/.env using Playwright. Confirmed hero CTAs, 3 services, 6 product cards with images, 4 why-choose points, 11 gallery images loaded (0 broken), contact section details/map/WhatsApp, sticky nav, desktop anchors, mobile menu anchors, and no contact form.
rca of the issue: No functional failures reproduced in this iteration. Minor visual overlap risk observed due to independent floating badge near the WhatsApp CTA on small screens.
